gameplay_impact: Ekaterina Workshop now trains Signal Teams. Signal Teams carry Mark Target on hotkey D: 15 steel, 8-tile range, 25s cooldown, queued world-point targeting, immediate fog-safe marker, 2s delayed pulse, 1.25-tile radius, 20 normal unit-only damage with friendly fire and no building damage. Client protocol, command card, visuals, audio trigger, and state handling now understand the new kind, ability, marker, and impact events.
next_executor_notes: Ekaterina remains dev-scenario-only. Normal lobby selection, AI support, prediction, self-play faction support, replay branch promotion, and match-history replay remain gated for later phases. Phase 12 should continue the roster/progression rollout from the plan without assuming these gates are open.
manual_test_notes: Manual local/dev match smoke was not run in this executor pass. High-value manual follow-up: open dev:ekaterina_opening, train a Signal Team from Workshop, cast Mark Target at visible enemies and mixed friendly/enemy units, confirm blue marker/pulse readability, steel spend/cooldown, friendly fire, and no hidden caster reveal to enemies.
